summary: Composite Build Directive v2.8.9 - Frontend Testing Complete. ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. VinylVariantPage & VariantReleasePage show 'The Honeypot Price' cards correctly. Now Spinning modal has compact 3-col mood grid, max-h-90vh, and sticky footer submit button.

minor.issue: Intermittent 503 errors in console - possibly backend pod scaling or websocket connection issues. Does not block functionality.

passed_tests: Frontend compilation - app loads without errors
Login flow works for admin@thehoneygroove.com / admin_password - redirects to /hive
VinylVariantPage.js - 'The Honeypot Price' card renders with data-testid='honey-market-card'
VinylVariantPage.js - Shows 'Not for sale / List yours' CTA when no internal listings
VariantReleasePage.js - 'The Honeypot Price' card renders in scarcity section with data-testid='honey-market-stat'
VariantReleasePage.js - 'The Honeypot Price' card renders in Market Value section with data-testid='honeypot-price-card'
VariantReleasePage.js - No TrendingDown reference error - page renders correctly with Store icon
Now Spinning modal - Opens from composer bar chip (data-testid='composer-chip-now_spinning')
Now Spinning modal - Has max-h-[90vh] constraint
Now Spinning modal - Mood tags are compact 3-col grid (grid-cols-3 gap-1.5)
Now Spinning modal - 12 mood tags found with smaller padding (px-2 py-1.5)
Now Spinning modal - Submit button in sticky footer (shrink-0 border-t) outside scroll area
Now Spinning modal - Submit button visible and clickable
Now Spinning modal - Scrollable content area exists (overflow-y-auto)
Now Spinning modal - Mood selection works (Late Night clicked successfully)
Now Spinning modal - Record search input present (data-testid='spin-record-search')
Mobile viewport test - Submit button stays visible after scrolling (y=643.75)
Mobile viewport test - 3-column mood grid maintained on mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Composite Build Directive v2.8.9 verified. The Honeypot Price cards replace Discogs 'Lowest Price' on VinylVariantPage (honey-market-card) and VariantReleasePage (honeypot-price-card in market value, honey-market-stat in scarcity). Now Spinning modal uses flex layout with fixed header, scrollable content (overflow-y-auto), and sticky footer (shrink-0 border-t). Mood tags use grid-cols-3 gap-1.5 with px-2 py-1.5 padding. Modal max-height is 90vh. All data-testid attributes verified: honey-market-card, honeypot-price-card, honey-market-stat, composer-chip-now_spinning, spin-submit-btn, spin-record-search, mood-* tags.
